description: Integrate SNOMED CT into terminology and translation support
known_blockers: SNOMED CT release access depends on national or affiliate license terms.
RF2 payloads must not be committed unless redistribution permission is explicit.
Postcoordination and hierarchy semantics need separate handling from flat label matching.

SNOMED CT affiliate/member license, MLDS release access, edition/extension terms, RF2 redistribution constraints, and cross-map terms must be cleared before committing concepts, descriptions, relationships, refsets, language refsets, OWL axioms, maps, full API/export responses, or release payload rows.
expected_blockers: Localized extensions can diverge from the international release.
Cross-map availability and licensing can vary by jurisdiction.
blocker_owner: track implementer until reassigned in Phase 0
fallback_path: Record edition-specific governance and use public documentation/tooling references only until licensed MLDS release access, edition/extension scope, RF2 redistribution terms, and cross-map permissions are confirmed.

evidence_score_policy.promotion_rule: no ontology or LLM signal promotes a translation without human review

last_run.source_version: official SNOMED site and MLDS portal observed; release version and RF2 payload not downloaded
last_run.validation_command: pixi run build-ontology-network; pixi run validate-conductor; pixi run validate-ontology-network; pixi run validate-ontology-network-artifacts; pixi run test-conductor-validation; git diff --check
open_blockers: SNOMED CT affiliate/member license review required
MLDS release access and edition scope review required
national extension and language refset terms review required
RF2 redistribution and cross-map terms review required

restricted_payload_policy.commit_policy: commit metadata, schemas, bounded non-restricted samples, validation summaries, review-pack structure, and derived reports only after source terms are verified; raw, credentialed, private, full-release, and licensed payloads stay local-only
required_evidence: local-only manifest if any restricted source is touched
redaction or exclusion proof before commit

fail_fast_probe.scope: one authoritative source record, one normalized registry row, one provenance row, one candidate comparison or crosswalk edge when applicable
success_criteria: source authority and license state recorded
payload handling path classified as commit-safe or local-only
schema validation passes for the bounded sample
review pack marks LLM-derived content as candidate-only when present
